name: Alvin Super Hero
description: Join the, Alvin Super Hero , in an action-packed superhero training game. Theodore has created a high-speed Superboard, and now its time to see who deserves it in a neighborhood race. If youve played Temple Run before , youll be familiar with the gameplay &ndash; navigate a randomly generated obstacle course through the streets, collect coins, and run as far as you can. But watch out for obstacles; one collision ends the race. Test your skills in this thrilling Super Hero adventure!
instructions: - desktop Avoid the obstacles Use the arrow keys to steer left and right - mobile Avoid the obstacles Swipe left or right to control - desktop Use the arrow keys to jump or duck - mobile Swipe up or down to jump or crouch
tags: run, running, Skateboard, subway, Subway Surfers, Super, Superhero
